nodes.label: page.tsx (root)
nodes.description: Root Next.js page that hosts the main app shell and routes to StudentView when the student role is active.

nodes.label: src/app/page.tsx
nodes.description: Main Next.js app page. Imports multiple sanad view components including the now-unavailable CommunicationsView, plus ClientsView, InvoicesView, ScannerView, CalendarView, StudentView, and TodayFocusView.
